---
description: Validates the active task brief and linked files
---
# Check Task

When the user asks you to check the task, validate the active workflow files against the CLI rules.

1. Run the terminal command: \`pnpm workflow check\`.
2. If the check fails, read the active task brief and automatically repair any missing fields or broken links.
3. Rerun the check to ensure success before reporting back to the user.
